prompt:
Create a bar chart of data in multiple groups with error bars. Note that: The function uses a predefined set of colors for the bars. If there are more groups than colors, the colors will repeat from the beginning of the COLORS list. This function uses "Bar chart of {value_col} by {group_col}" for the plot title. This function uses the value of variables group_col and value_col as the xlabel and ylabel respectively. The function should raise the exception for: This function will raise TypeError if the 'Value' has non-numeric values. The function should output with: tuple(ax: matplotlib.axes.Axes, title: str)
ax: A matplotlib axes object with the bar chart. 
title: The title of the plot generated.

